title: corydalis tangutica subsp. tangutica
intro: Corydalis tangutica subsp. tangutica is a plant species belonging to the Papaveraceae family, known for its unique, tubular flowers and tubers. The tubers of Corydalis tangutica subsp. tangutica have been traditionally used in Chinese medicine, where they are valued for their analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its ability to inhibit the production of pain-causing chemicals in the body, making it a useful treatment for conditions such as arthritis and fibromyalgia. Corydalis tangutica subsp. tangutica is often prepared as a tincture, capsule, or tea, and is also used as a topical cream to relieve pain and reduce inflammation.
